ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. 11 pages of commercial invoice (pages 1-11) plus 5 pages of packing list (pages 12-16). All fields legible.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The order numbers S6597MU501 and S6739TR508 do not constitute LC references.

locations_found: Invoice page 11: 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' in signature block at bottom right
Invoice pages 1-11: 'BERG PROPULSION' logo/branding in header of every page
Invoice pages 1-11: 'Berg Propulsion Middle East (Branch)' in Address footer of every page
consignor_search_result.notes: The certificate consignor is 'Berg Prop Prod. AB'. The invoice contains 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' (page 11 signature block). The name 'Berg Prop Prod.' appears to be a commercial abbreviation of 'Berg Propulsion Production'. The invoice issuer address is 'Berg Propulsion Middle East (Branch)' in Dubai, UAE.

criteria_met: Criterion 2: Certifikatets consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' can be identified in the invoice via the signature block 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' and the branding 'BERG PROPULSION'.
Criterion 3: Certifikatets consignee 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L' can be identified in the invoice delivery address as 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L.L'.
pairing_validation.motivation: At least two of three pairing criteria are met. The certificate's consignor name can be identified in the invoice (Berg Propulsion Production AB on page 11), and the consignee can be identified in the delivery address. No explicit invoice number is referenced in the certificate, but order numbers S6597MU501 and S6739TR508 match the invoice order numbers.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Berg Prop Prod. AB, Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40, HÖNÖ, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Berg Propulsion Production AB, Långesand 1, Box 1005, SE-475 22 ÖCKERÖ (page 11 signature block); BERG PROPULSION (header branding); Berg Propulsion Middle East (Branch), Dubai, UAE (address footer)

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' anywhere in invoice files
comparison_steps.result: NOT directly found as exact string. However, 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' found on page 11 signature block. The certificate abbreviation 'Berg Prop Prod.' needs further analysis via 4.1.3.

comparison_steps.description: Compare 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' with 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'
comparison_steps.result: Names differ: 'Prop' vs 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' vs 'Production'. These appear to be abbreviations. Continue to 4.1.3.3.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate name is a prefix of invoice name
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable. 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' is not a prefix truncation of 'Berg Propulsion Production AB'. Continue to 4.1.3.3.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 'Prop' is a vedertagen förkortning of 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' is a vedertagen förkortning of 'Production'
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. 'Prop.' is a clear and recognized abbreviation of 'Propulsion'. 'Prod.' is a clear and recognized abbreviation of 'Production'. The full legal name 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' is expressly stated in the invoice (page 11). No other legal party with similar name structure exists in the invoice. The address with SE-475 postcode confirms Sweden. All conditions of 4.1.3.3 are met.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: Sweden. Invoice: SE-475 22 ÖCKERÖ (page 11 signature block with SE postcode prefix confirming Sweden).
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. Sweden verified via postcode prefix SE and address in Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Land verified via SE-prefix in postcode

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The invoice issuer is 'Berg Propulsion Middle East (Branch)' in UAE, not in Sweden - MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The registered legal entity 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' with Swedish address is expressly stated on page 11 of the invoice. The Branch in Dubai is the invoicing branch, but the parent company in Sweden is identified. Rule 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.3 allow identification anywhere in the invoice.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' is a commercial abbreviation of 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' which is expressly identified in the invoice signature block on page 11 with address 'Långesand 1, Box 1005, SE-475 22 ÖCKERÖ'. 'Prop.' is a vedertagen abbreviation of 'Propulsion' and 'Prod.' is a vedertagen abbreviation of 'Production'. Country Sweden is verified via the SE-prefix in the postcode. All conditions of rule 4.1.3.3 are satisfied: (1) abbreviations are clear and vedertagna, (2) full legal name is in the invoice, (3) no other similar party, (4) address and land match, (5) no contradicting information.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' identifieras som en kommersiell förkortning av 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' som uttryckligen anges på fakturans sida 11. Land Sverige verifieras via postkoden SE-475 22. MATCH enligt regel 4.1.3.3.

checkpoints.certificate_value: HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L, MSM - Workshop, Building Number- 56, Street Number -- 3019, Zone - 91, Birkat Al Awamer, City- Doha, Qatar
checkpoints.invoice_value: HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L.L, MSM - Workshop, Building Number – 56, Street Number – 3019, Zone – 91, Birkat Al Awamer, City- Doha, Qatar (Delivery address, page 1)

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: The invoice has a 'Mailing address' field with 'MILAHA SHIP MANAGEMENT W.L.L.' and a 'Delivery address' field with 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L.L'. There is no explicit 'Invoice to' / 'Bill to' / 'Sold to' / 'Buyer' field. The 'Mailing address' could function as a billing address. The certificate consignee 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L' is found in the delivery address.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate is issued for the end recipient (Ship-To party)
comparison_steps.result: The certificate consignee 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L' matches the delivery address exactly. The mailing address party 'MILAHA SHIP MANAGEMENT W.L.L.' is a different entity (ship management company). Both parties appear in the same invoice, confirming they are part of the same supply chain. The COO is issued for the actual goods recipient. All conditions of 4.2.0.3 are met: (1) consignee identified exactly in Ship-To/Delivery field, (2) Mailing address has a different party, (3) both in same invoice, (4) no contradicting info. MATCH via Ship-To-regel.

Minor difference in legal form suffix: 'W.L' vs 'W.L.L'. In Qatari company law, W.L.L. stands for 'With Limited Liability'. The certificate uses 'W.L' which appears to be a truncation. All other parts of the name match exactly. This is a minor abbreviation difference in legal form per rule 4.1.3.6 (applied to consignee via 4.2).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: Qatar. Invoice delivery address: Qatar.

rules_applied.description: Ship-To-regel - Certificate issued for end recipient in delivery address
Förkortning av juridisk bolagsform - W.L vs W.L.L treated as equivalent legal form abbreviations

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because mailing address is 'MILAHA SHIP MANAGEMENT W.L.L.' which differs from certificate consignee
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The mailing address is not the only party field. The delivery address contains the certificate consignee. Rule 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To-regel) applies: the COO is issued for the actual goods recipient (HALUL OFFSHORE) while the invoice mailing is to the ship management company (MILAHA). Both are in the same invoice.
This is a minor difference in legal form abbreviation. 'W.L' and 'W.L.L' both refer to 'With Limited Liability' in Qatari/Gulf legal terminology. Rule 4.1.3.6 applied to consignee allows this.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L' is identified in the invoice delivery address as 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L.L'. The difference is only in the legal form suffix (W.L vs W.L.L), which is a permissible variation per rule 4.1.3.6. Country Qatar matches exactly. The Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3) is applied because the invoice's mailing address names a different party (MILAHA SHIP MANAGEMENT), but the delivery address matches the certificate consignee, confirming the COO was issued for the actual goods recipient.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L' identifieras i fakturans leveransadress som 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L.L'. Skillnaden W.L vs W.L.L avser bolagsformens förkortning. Land Qatar stämmer. MATCH enligt Ship-To-regeln 4.2.0.3 och 4.1.3.6.

checkpoints.certificate_value: 4 Cases, Case 1: 80*60*35 cm / 106 Kg, Case 2: 120*80*35 cm / 282 Kg, Case 3: 120*80*35 cm / 315 Kg, Case 4: 80*60*55 cm / 120 Kg. Order references: S6597MU501 and S6739TR508.
checkpoints.invoice_value: PARTS FOR THE 10 YEARS SURVEY OF PROPELLER TYPE MPP690 TWIN AS PER CUSTOMER LIST (page 1). Order numbers S6597MU501 and S6739TR508. Packing list (page 16): Kolli 1: 80*60*35 cm/ 106 Kg, Kolli 2: 120*80*35 cm/ 282 Kg, Kolli 3: 120*80*35 cm/ 315 Kg, 80*60*55cm/ 120 Kg.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.result: Certificate does not contain individual article numbers. It describes packages/cases with dimensions and weights. No article numbers to match. Proceed to Prioritet 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning in certificate
comparison_steps.result: The certificate describes '4 Cases' with specific dimensions and weights per case. This is a shipment-level description (packages). The invoice packing list on page 16 contains matching kolli descriptions: Kolli 1: 80*60*35 cm/ 106 Kg, Kolli 2: 120*80*35 cm/ 282 Kg, Kolli 3: 120*80*35 cm/ 315 Kg, and 80*60*55cm/ 120 Kg. The 4 cases with identical dimensions and weights are verifiable.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate order references match invoice
comparison_steps.result: Certificate references 'Order S6597MU501 and S6739TR508'. Invoice header shows order numbers S6597MU501 and S6739TR508. Exact match on both order numbers.

comparison_steps.description: Verify case dimensions and weights between certificate and packing list
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: Case 1: 80*60*35 cm / 106 Kg, Case 2: 120*80*35 cm / 282 Kg, Case 3: 120*80*35 cm / 315 Kg, Case 4: 80*60*55 cm / 120 Kg. Packing list (page 16): Kolli 1: 80*60*35 cm/ 106 Kg, Kolli 2: 120*80*35 cm/ 282 Kg, Kolli 3: 120*80*35 cm/ 315 Kg, 80*60*55cm/ 120 Kg. All 4 cases match exactly in dimensions and weight.

rules_applied.description: Textmatchning - Package descriptions (4 Cases with dimensions/weights) verified against packing list
Order references S6597MU501 and S6739TR508 match exactly between certificate and invoice

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate does not list individual parts/articles
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The certificate uses a shipment-level description (4 Cases with dimensions and weights) which is a valid approach for COO certificates covering multiple parts. The package descriptions are verifiable against the packing list, and the order references link the certificate to the specific invoice/order.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: The certificate describes the goods as '4 Cases' with specific dimensions and weights per case. This shipment-level description is verified against the invoice's packing list (page 16) where identical kolli descriptions are found: Kolli 1-3 with matching dimensions (80*60*35, 120*80*35, 120*80*35) and weights (106 Kg, 282 Kg, 315 Kg), plus a 4th package (80*60*55 cm / 120 Kg). The order references S6597MU501 and S6739TR508 in the certificate match the invoice order numbers exactly. The goods description is verifiable at the shipment/package level.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning '4 Cases' med dimensioner och vikter per kolli verifieras mot fakturans packlista (sida 16) där identiska kolliuppgifter återfinns. Orderreferenserna S6597MU501 och S6739TR508 stämmer exakt. MATCH.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Packing list confirms 4 kolli (3 kolli on page 16 top + 1 kolli at bottom of page 16, corresponding to orders S6597MU501 and S6739TR508).

comparison_steps.result: Box 7 (Quantity/Mängd) is EMPTY. However, Box 6 contains '4 Cases' which constitutes a shipment quantity per rule 4.4.3.2.
Box 7 is empty (no value). Box 6 contains '4 Cases'. Since Box 7 is empty, Box 6's '4 Cases' is the only available quantity. This is a försändelsekvantitet per 4.4.3.2.

Certificate states '4 Cases'. The packing list (pages 12-16) confirms the shipment consists of 4 kolli with matching dimensions and weights. The order references are verified (S6597MU501 and S6739TR508). Per rule 4.4.3.2, a shipment quantity such as '4 Cases' is deemed verified when the certificate contains a verifiable reference and the invoice/packing list confirms the shipment. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Försändelsekvantitet - '4 Cases' verified as shipment quantity against packing list

rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Box 7 being empty does not constitute MISMATCH when Box 6 contains a valid shipment quantity ('4 Cases') that can be verified per rule 4.4.3.2.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Box 7 (Quantity) in the certificate is empty. Box 6 contains '4 Cases' with specific dimensions and weights. Per rule 4.4.3.2, a shipment quantity such as '4 Cases' is acceptable and deemed verified when the packing list confirms the number of kolli. The packing list on pages 12-16 confirms exactly 4 kolli with matching dimensions and weights. The order references S6597MU501 and S6739TR508 link the certificate to the correct invoice. MATCH.
checkpoints.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitetsfält (ruta 7) är tomt, men ruta 6 anger '4 Cases' med dimensioner och vikter. Detta utgör en försändelsekvantitet enligt regel 4.4.3.2 som verifieras mot packlistans 4 kolli med matchande mått och vikter. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: SE, DE, GB, CH, IT, ES, TW, AT
checkpoints.invoice_value: Sweden, Germany, United Kingdom, Switzerland, Italy, Spain, Taiwan, Austria (per article COO fields across pages 1-11)

comparison_steps.result: The invoice contains 'COO:' and 'Country of origin:' fields per article line across all pages. Multiple origin countries are explicitly stated.

comparison_steps.description: Map certificate ISO codes to invoice country names
comparison_steps.result: SE → Sweden: Found (e.g. COO: Sweden on multiple lines). DE → Germany: Found (Country of origin: Germany on multiple lines). GB → United Kingdom: Found (COO: United Kingdom on page 4-5). CH → Switzerland: Found (Country of origin: Switzerland on page 5, 10). IT → Italy: Found (Country of origin: Italy on page 5). ES → Spain: Found (Country of origin: Spain on page 7-8). TW → Taiwan: Found (Country of origin: Taiwan on page 9). AT → Austria: Found (Country of origin: Austria on page 9). All 8 origin countries from the certificate are identified in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Check if origins are properly attributed to goods
comparison_steps.result: Certificate lists origin codes without per-article attribution in the certificate itself. However, the certificate describes the goods as 4 Cases (a shipment-level description) and references order numbers. The invoice provides per-article origin. Since the certificate does not list individual articles, per-article origin attribution in the certificate is not applicable in the traditional sense. The 8 country codes in Box 3 represent all origins within the shipment, and all 8 are confirmed in the invoice.

rules_applied.description: Normalisering - ISO country codes mapped to full country names: SE=Sweden, DE=Germany, GB=United Kingdom, CH=Switzerland, IT=Italy, ES=Spain, TW=Taiwan, AT=Austria
All 8 origin countries explicitly identified in invoice via COO/Country of origin fields per article

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate does not attribute origins to specific articles
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The certificate uses a shipment-level description (4 Cases) and lists all 8 origin countries in Box 3. Since the certificate does not list individual articles (only packages), per-article attribution is not required per rule 4.3.7 (which requires attribution only when articles are listed separately). All 8 origins from the certificate are confirmed in the invoice's per-article origin fields.

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 lists 8 origin country codes: SE, DE, GB, CH, IT, ES, TW, AT. Each was mapped to its full country name and searched in the invoice's COO/Country of origin fields. All 8 were found: Sweden (multiple articles), Germany (multiple articles), United Kingdom (e.g. LX4460, SM7144, LB23480), Switzerland (LB3590, MT27306-08), Italy (TX4490, TO4490), Spain (TR23596, TR1136), Taiwan (BG1007), Austria (TM4440). All origin countries in the certificate are verified against the invoice.
checkpoints.motivation: Samtliga 8 ursprungsländer i certifikatet (SE, DE, GB, CH, IT, ES, TW, AT) kan identifieras uttryckligen i fakturans COO-fält per artikelrad. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Document A identified as Certificate of Origin, Document B identified as Commercial Invoice with Packing List. Single certificate, single multi-page invoice. Pairing via order references S6597MU501 and S6739TR508.
PASS. Criteria 2 (consignor identified) and Criteria 3 (consignee identified) are met.
Berg Propulsion Production AB found on page 11. Commercial abbreviation analysis needed.
Name difference detected: Prop vs Propulsion, Prod. vs Production. Continue to next rule.
MATCH. Prop.=Propulsion, Prod.=Production are clear commercial abbreviations. All conditions met.
MATCH. Sweden verified via SE postcode prefix.
No explicit 'Invoice to'/'Bill to' field. Mailing address contains different party. Delivery address contains certificate consignee.
MATCH. Certificate consignee identified in Ship-To/Delivery field. Invoice mailing address has different party. Same invoice confirms both parties.
W.L vs W.L.L accepted as equivalent legal form abbreviation.
No article numbers in certificate. Proceed to Prioritet 2.
MATCH. 4 Cases with dimensions/weights verified against packing list.
MATCH. Order references S6597MU501 and S6739TR508 match exactly.
MATCH. '4 Cases' verified as shipment quantity.
MATCH. All 8 ISO codes mapped and found in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' identifieras som en förkortning av 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' på fakturan. Mottagaren 'HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY' återfinns i fakturans leveransadress. Varubeskrivningen (4 Cases med mått och vikter) verifieras mot packlistan, och samtliga 8 ursprungsländer bekräftas i fakturans artikelrader. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All 5 checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor matched via commercial abbreviation (4.1.3.3). Consignee matched via Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3) with minor legal form variation (W.L vs W.L.L). Goods description matched at shipment level (4 Cases with dimensions/weights against packing list). Quantity matched via shipment quantity rule (4.4.3.2). All 8 origin countries (SE, DE, GB, CH, IT, ES, TW, AT) confirmed in invoice per-article COO fields.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Berg Prop Prod. AB, Tärnvägen 15, SE-475 40, HÖNÖ, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Berg Propulsion Production AB, Långesand 1, Box 1005, SE-475 22 ÖCKERÖ (sida 11); BERG PROPULSION (logotyp/sidhuvud alla sidor)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets 'Berg Prop Prod. AB' är en vedertagen kommersiell förkortning av 'Berg Propulsion Production AB' som uttryckligen anges i fakturans signaturblock på sida 11. Land Sverige verifieras via SE-prefix i postkod.

sections.certificate_value: HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L, Qatar
sections.invoice_value: HALUL OFFSHORE SERVICES COMPANY W.L.L, MSM - Workshop, Doha, Qatar (leveransadress, sida 1)
sections.rule_applied: Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3) + förkortning av juridisk bolagsform (W.L vs W.L.L)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare identifieras i fakturans leveransadress med minimal skillnad i bolagsformsbeteckning (W.L vs W.L.L). Land Qatar stämmer. Ship-To-regeln tillämpas då fakturans postadress avser annan part (MILAHA SHIP MANAGEMENT).

sections.invoice_value: PARTS FOR THE 10 YEARS SURVEY OF PROPELLER TYPE MPP690 TWIN. Packlista (sida 16): Kolli 1-4 med identiska mått och vikter. Order S6597MU501 och S6739TR508.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets 4 kollin med exakta dimensioner och vikter verifieras mot packlistans kolliuppgifter. Orderreferenserna S6597MU501 och S6739TR508 stämmer exakt med fakturans ordernummer.

sections.invoice_value: Packlista bekräftar 4 kolli med matchande dimensioner och vikter.
sections.motivation: Ruta 7 är tom men ruta 6 anger '4 Cases' med specificerade mått och vikter. Försändelsekvantiteten verifieras mot packlistans 4 kolli. Orderreferenserna kopplar certifikatet till rätt faktura.

sections.certificate_value: SE, DE, GB, CH, IT, ES, TW, AT
sections.invoice_value: Sweden, Germany, United Kingdom, Switzerland, Italy, Spain, Taiwan, Austria (COO/Country of origin per artikelrad, sida 1-11)
sections.rule_applied: ISO-kodsnormalisering och verifiering av samtliga 8 ursprungsländer
sections.motivation: Samtliga 8 landskoder i certifikatet (SE, DE, GB, CH, IT, ES, TW, AT) kan identifieras i fakturans COO-fält per artikelrad: Sweden, Germany, United Kingdom, Switzerland, Italy, Spain, Taiwan, Austria.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH. comparison_result is IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation is AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. All confidence values are >= 0.85. Consistency verified.
